title: vitis lanceolaria
intro: Vitis lanceolaria, also known as the China grapevine or Chinese grapevine, is a species of grapevine native to southern China. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves, which are used to treat various health issues. The leaves of Vitis lanceolaria have been traditionally used to treat fever, sore throats, and digestive problems due to their anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves are often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness their health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and promoting digestive health.
